-- 1. Find all minor tokens
insert into appl.claims_minor_tokens_t (token)
select distinct token
FROM [customer].[stg_incr_claims1_t]
where patient_age < 18
union
select distinct token
FROM [customer].[stg_incr_claims2_t]
where patient_age < 18
union
select distinct token
FROM [customer].[stg_incr_claims3_t]
where patient_age < 18
union
select distinct token
FROM [customer].[stg_incr_claims4_t]
where patient_age < 18;
go


-- 2. apply xd rules to mortality data
delete from [appl].[deid_mortality_t];
insert into [appl].[deid_mortality_t]
(
  [input_token]
  , [record_id]
  , [deceased_match_indicator]
  , [month_of_death]
  , [verified_or_proof_code]
  , [deceased_source]
  , [confidence_score]
)
select 
  a.[input_token]
  , a.[record_id]
  , a.[deceased_match_indicator]
  , case when deceased_match_indicator = 'Y'
              and ((len(date_of_death) = 4 and cast(date_of_death as integer) between 2022 and 2024)
                    or (len(date_of_death) >= 6 and cast(substring(date_of_death, 5, 2) as integer) between 1 and 12) and substring(date_of_death, 1, 6) between '202201' and '202403')
              and b.token is null then 
      case when len(a.[date_of_death]) >= 6 then substring(a.[date_of_death], 1, 6) else date_of_death end
  else null
  end as month_of_death
  , case when deceased_match_indicator = 'Y'
              and ((len(date_of_death) = 4 and cast(date_of_death as integer) between 2022 and 2024)
                    or (len(date_of_death) >= 6 and cast(substring(date_of_death, 5, 2) as integer) between 1 and 12) and substring(date_of_death, 1, 6) between '202201' and '202403')
              and b.token is null then a.[verified_or_proof_code]
  else null
  end as [verified_or_proof_code]
  , case when deceased_match_indicator = 'Y'
              and ((len(date_of_death) = 4 and cast(date_of_death as integer) between 2022 and 2024)
                    or (len(date_of_death) >= 6 and cast(substring(date_of_death, 5, 2) as integer) between 1 and 12) and substring(date_of_death, 1, 6) between '202201' and '202403')
              and b.token is null then a.[deceased_source]
  else null
  end as [deceased_source]
  , case when deceased_match_indicator = 'Y'
              and ((len(date_of_death) = 4 and cast(date_of_death as integer) between 2022 and 2024)
                    or (len(date_of_death) >= 6 and cast(substring(date_of_death, 5, 2) as integer) between 1 and 12) and substring(date_of_death, 1, 6) between '202201' and '202403')
              and b.token is null then a.[confidence_score]
  else null
  end as [confidence_score]
from 
  [customer].[stg_incr_mortality_t] a
  left join [appl].[claims_minor_tokens_t] b
  on a.input_token = b.token
;

-- 4. find the right patient age for the tokens with multiple ages in a single year
delete from appl.claims_age_by_year_t;
insert into appl.claims_age_by_year_t
(
	token
  , dos_year
  , patient_age
)
SELECT distinct token
  , case when ISDATE(DOS_BEGIN) = 1 then year(DOS_BEGIN) else try_cast(substring(DOS_BEGIN, 1, 4) as integer) end dos_year
  , cast(patient_age as integer) as patient_age
FROM [customer].[stg_incr_claims_1_t] a 
union
SELECT distinct token
  , case when ISDATE(DOS_BEGIN) = 1 then year(DOS_BEGIN) else try_cast(substring(DOS_BEGIN, 1, 4) as integer) end dos_year
  , cast(patient_age as integer) as patient_age
FROM [customer].[stg_incr_claims_2_t] a
union
SELECT distinct token
  , case when ISDATE(DOS_BEGIN) = 1 then year(DOS_BEGIN) else try_cast(substring(DOS_BEGIN, 1, 4) as integer) end dos_year
  , cast(patient_age as integer) as patient_age
FROM [customer].[stg_incr_claims_3_t] a
union
SELECT distinct token
  , case when ISDATE(DOS_BEGIN) = 1 then year(DOS_BEGIN) else try_cast(substring(DOS_BEGIN, 1, 4) as integer) end dos_year
  , cast(patient_age as integer) as patient_age
FROM [customer].[stg_incr_claims_4_t] a
;

delete from appl.claims_corrected_age_t;
insert into  appl.claims_corrected_age_t
(
	token
  , dos_year
  , min_patient_age
  , diff_patient_age
  , cnt_patient_age
) as
select token, dos_year
  , min(case when patient_age > 85 then 85 when patient_age < 1 then 1 else patient_age end) as min_patient_age
  , max(case when patient_age > 85 then 85 when patient_age < 1 then 1 else patient_age end) - min(case when patient_age > 85 then 85 when patient_age < 1 then 1 else patient_age end) as diff_patient_age
  , count(distinct case when patient_age > 85 then 85 when patient_age < 1 then 1 else patient_age end) as cnt_patient_age
from appl.claims_age_by_year_t
group by token, dos_year
having count(distinct case when patient_age > 85 then 85 when patient_age < 1 then 1 else patient_age end) = 2 
  and max(case when patient_age > 85 then 85 when patient_age < 1 then 1 else patient_age end) - min(case when patient_age > 85 then 85 when patient_age < 1 then 1 else patient_age end) = 1
;

-- CREATE STATISTICS stg_incr_claims_1_zip3 ON [customer].[stg_incr_claims_1_t]([PATIENT_ZIP_3]);

delete from [appl].[deid_claims_1_t];
  -- redact age, gender, zip3
insert into [appl].[deid_claims_1_t]
(
    [TOKEN]
    ,[CLAIM_NUM]
    ,[CLAIM_LINE_NUM]
    ,[CLAIM_TYPE]
    ,[DOS_BEGIN]
    ,[DOS_END]
    ,[PRACT_NPI]
    ,[SVC_FACILITY_NPI]
    ,[PATIENT_GENDER]
    ,[PATIENT_AGE]
    ,[PATIENT_ZIP_3]
    ,[PROCEDURE_SCHEME]
    ,[PROCEDURE_CODE]
    ,[PROC_MD_1]
    ,[PROC_MD_2]
    ,[PROC_MD_3]
    ,[PROC_MD_4]
    ,[DIAG_CD1]
    ,[DIAG_CD2]
    ,[DIAG_CD3]
    ,[DIAG_CD4]
    ,[DIAG_CD5]
    ,[DIAG_CD6]
    ,[DIAG_CD7]
    ,[DIAG_CD8]
    ,[DIAG_CD9]
    ,[DIAG_CD10]
    ,[DIAG_CD11]
    ,[DIAG_CD12]
    ,[DIAG_CD13]
    ,[DIAG_CD14]
    ,[DIAG_CD15]
    ,[DIAG_CD16]
    ,[DIAG_CD17]
    ,[DIAG_CD18]
    ,[DIAG_CD19]
    ,[DIAG_CD20]
    ,[ICD_VERSION]
    ,[DRG_CODE]
    ,[NDC_CD]
    ,[SETTING_OF_CARE]
    ,[UNITS_OF_SERVICE]
    ,[LINE_OF_BUSINESS]
    ,[835_FLAG]
    ,[CHARGE_AMT]
    ,[PAID_AMT]
    ,[ALLOWED_AMT]
    ,[PATIENT_RESP]
)
select 
    c.[TOKEN]
    , c.[CLAIM_NUM]
    , c.[CLAIM_LINE_NUM]
    , c.[CLAIM_TYPE]
    , c.[DOS_BEGIN]
    , c.[DOS_END]
    , c.[PRACT_NPI]
    , c.[SVC_FACILITY_NPI]
    -- redact gender
    , case when c.[PATIENT_GENDER] is null or c.[PATIENT_GENDER] = '' then 'U' else c.[PATIENT_GENDER] end AS [PATIENT_GENDER]
    -- redact age
    , case when cast(c.[PATIENT_AGE] as integer) > 85 then '85' when cast(c.[PATIENT_AGE] as integer) < 1 then '1' else c.[PATIENT_AGE] end AS [PATIENT_AGE]
    -- redact zip3
    case when z2.zip3 is null or c.[PATIENT_ZIP_3] is null or c.[PATIENT_ZIP_3] = '000' or c.[PATIENT_ZIP_3] = '' then '000' 
    when m.[input_token] is null then coalesce(z1.zip3_to, c.[PATIENT_ZIP_3]) 
    else substring(coalesce(z1.zip3_to, c.[PATIENT_ZIP_3]), 1, 2) 
    end AS [PATIENT_ZIP_3]
    , c.[PROCEDURE_SCHEME]
    , c.[PROCEDURE_CODE]
    , c.[PROC_MD_1]
    , c.[PROC_MD_2]
    , c.[PROC_MD_3]
    , c.[PROC_MD_4]
    , c.[DIAG_CD1]
    , c.[DIAG_CD2]
    , c.[DIAG_CD3]
    , c.[DIAG_CD4]
    , c.[DIAG_CD5]
    , c.[DIAG_CD6]
    , c.[DIAG_CD7]
    , c.[DIAG_CD8]
    , c.[DIAG_CD9]
    , c.[DIAG_CD10]
    , c.[DIAG_CD11]
    , c.[DIAG_CD12]
    , c.[DIAG_CD13]
    , c.[DIAG_CD14]
    , c.[DIAG_CD15]
    , c.[DIAG_CD16]
    , c.[DIAG_CD17]
    , c.[DIAG_CD18]
    , c.[DIAG_CD19]
    , c.[DIAG_CD20]
    , c.[ICD_VERSION]
    , c.[DRG_CODE]
    , c.[NDC_CD]
    , c.[SETTING_OF_CARE]
    , c.[UNITS_OF_SERVICE]
    , c.[LINE_OF_BUSINESS]
    , c.[835_FLAG]
    , c.[CHARGE_AMT]
    , c.[PAID_AMT]
    , c.[ALLOWED_AMT]
    , c.[PATIENT_RESP]
from 
    [customer].[stg_incr_claims_1_t] c 
    left join [dim].[zip3_pop_lt_20k_t] z1
        on c.[PATIENT_ZIP_3] = z1.zip3_from
    left join (select distinct zip3 from [dim].[census_population_by_zip3_age_gender_t]) z2
        on coalesce(z1.zip3_to, c.[PATIENT_ZIP_3]) = z2.zip3
    left join [appl].[deid_mortality_tokens_t] m
        on c.[TOKEN] = m.[input_token];
GO


  -- correct age for patients with multiple ages in a year
update c
set c.[PATIENT_AGE] = a.min_patient_age
from [appl].[deid_claims_1_t] c
    inner join [appl].[claims_corrected_age_t] a
        on c.[token] = a.[token] 
        and case when ISDATE(c.[DOS_BEGIN]) = 1 then year(c.[DOS_BEGIN]) else try_cast(substring(c.[DOS_BEGIN], 1, 4) as integer) end = a.[dos_year];
GO


  --redact procedure code
-- CREATE STATISTICS deid_claims_1_procedure_code ON [appl].[deid_claims_1_t]([PROCEDURE_CODE]);
update c
set c.[PROCEDURE_CODE] = h.suppression 
from [appl].[deid_claims_1_t] c
    inner join [dim].[hcpcs_2024_sensitive_codes_t] h
        on c.[PROCEDURE_CODE] = h.code 
        and c.[PROCEDURE_SCHEME] = 'HCPCS';
GO

update c
set c.[PROCEDURE_CODE] = icdp.suppression
from [appl].[deid_claims_1_t] c
    inner join [dim].[icd_sensitive_codes_t] icdp
        on c.[PROCEDURE_CODE] = icdp.code 
        and c.[PROCEDURE_SCHEME] = 'ICD' + icdp.icd_version 
        and icdp.type = 'Procedure';
GO

  --redact procedure modifiers
update c
set c.[PROC_MD_1] = null
from [appl].[deid_claims_1_t] c
    inner join 
    (
        select code from [dim].[procedure_modifiers_sensitive_codes_t] 
        union 
        select code from [dim].[cpt_sensitive_codes_t]
    ) h
        on c.[PROC_MD_1] <> '' and c.[PROC_MD_1] = h.code
GO

    on c.[DRG_CODE] = drg.code

  --redact setting_of_care
update c
set c.[SETTING_OF_CARE] = a.suppression
from [appl].[deid_claims_1_t] c
    inner join
    (
        select 'P' as claims_type, code, suppression from [dim].[pos_sensitive_codes_t]
        union
        select distinct 'I' as claims_type, substring(code, 1, 3) as code, null as suppression from [dim].[type_of_bill_sensitive_codes_t]
    ) a
    on c.[CLAIM_TYPE] = a.claims_type
    and c.[SETTING_OF_CARE] = a.code
;


  --redact diagnosis code
update [appl].[deid_claims_1_t] 
set [DIAG_CD1] = null
where [DIAG_CD1] <> '' and [ICD_VERSION] = '9'
    and ((try_cast(substring([DIAG_CD1], 1, 3) as int) between 764 and 779) or [DIAG_CD1] in ('7616', '799', '7999', 'E9280') 
    or [DIAG_CD1] like 'V3%' or [DIAG_CD1] like 'E910%' or [DIAG_CD1] like 'E913%' or substring([DIAG_CD1], 1, 3) in ('798', 'E80', 'E81', 'E82', 'E83', 'E84', 'E95', 'E96', 'E97', 'E99'))
;
GO

update [appl].[deid_claims_1_t] 
set [DIAG_CD1] = 'V8541'
where [DIAG_CD1] <> '' and [ICD_VERSION] = '9'
    and [DIAG_CD1] in ('V8542', 'V8543', 'V8544', 'V8545','V8551', 'V8552', 'V8553', 'V8554')
;

update [appl].[deid_claims_1_t] 
set [DIAG_CD1] = null
